contexts.title: Ada Lovelace
contexts.text: Ada Lovelace was born in London and is often associated with early computing.

contexts.title: Charles Babbage
contexts.text: Charles Babbage designed the Analytical Engine and worked with Ada Lovelace.

contexts.title: Paris
contexts.text: Paris is the capital city of France.

question: Which machine did Charles Babbage design?

contexts.title: Charles Babbage
contexts.text: Charles Babbage designed the Analytical Engine, a proposed mechanical general-purpose computer.

contexts.title: Ada Lovelace
contexts.text: Ada Lovelace wrote notes about the Analytical Engine.

contexts.title: London
contexts.text: London is the capital of England.
